entity.summary: Ink-based decentralized exchange and token-launch platform with automated-market-maker pools, liquidity locking, presale, and token-creation surfaces.
entity.notes: Current independent exchange and protocol directories still report recent Ink markets and liquidity, but external sources conflict about continuity of the first-party domain. HEI therefore retains the canonical URL without asserting it live and classifies the venue as limited rather than active. No legal entity or jurisdiction is inferred from directory metadata.

evidence.title: SquidSwap project documentation
evidence.notes: Project documentation describes an Ink-based decentralized platform for token creation, presales, liquidity management, locking, and trading.

evidence.title: SquidSwap current markets and exchange profile
evidence.notes: Current exchange profile reports recently updated Ink spot markets and non-zero 24-hour trading volume. The low activity and uncertain first-party URL continuity support limited rather than active classification.
